prompt: A young villager adventurer standing idle, simple slate-blue tunic, short brown hair, small satchel.

A small weary adventurer seen from behind carrying an enormous overstuffed leather backpack, walking through a humble wooden village gate at golden dawn, warm low sun, long soft shadows, sense of relief and homecoming.

A lone abandoned leather adventurer's backpack lying tipped over on a dark forest road at night, flap open, a few gold coins spilled beside it, cold slate-blue moonlight, no people anywhere, somber quiet mood.
A small chibi cleric in beige robes with a golden cross pendant, hands folded, standing idle.
A small chibi soldier in dull grey armor holding a round shield, standing at ease.
A loyal brown hunting hound sitting, tail mid-wag, simple shapes.
A grey pack mule loaded with an oversized bulging backpack, looking nervous.
A wobbly translucent blue slime blob monster with two blank white oval eyes.
A scruffy grey forest wolf, hackles raised, side profile facing left.
A small green goblin scout in a ragged patched leather tunic holding a crude wooden club.
A wispy night shade specter, deep blue-black smoke body with two faint white oval eyes, ominous.
A hulking green goblin brute, broad shoulders, heavy jaw, crude armor plates, menacing stance.
A corrupted treant: gnarled walking tree monster, mossy canopy, one glowing red knot, reaching branch arms.
